reply: Hi there! This sounds like a fun collab. Before I commit, could you let me know what the budget looks like for the Reel and Stories package?
Thanks for reaching out about AeroSoft! Happy to chat. What are you offering for this one? I like to see the numbers before we go further.
Love the brand aesthetic. Could you share the compensation details? I'd want to understand the fee structure before saying yes.
Hey! Quick question before anything else — how much are you paying for the Reel plus three Stories? Want to make sure it's worth my time.
Appreciate you thinking of me. What's the rate on this campaign? I don't have a set number in mind yet, just want to hear yours.
Sounds interesting! Can you send over the offer so I can review it with my team? Need to see the fee before we discuss timeline.
Ooh footwear content is my thing. What does this pay? I'm open but need a figure to work with.
Hi! Let's talk numbers — what are you putting on the table for the full deliverable set? Then I can tell you if it's a fit.
Thanks so much for the invite. Would you mind sharing your fee proposal? I haven't landed on a price, curious what you had budgeted.
Hey team! Go ahead and name your price for the Reel + Stories bundle and I'll let you know where I stand.
Really into what AeroSoft is doing. What's on the table financially? I'd rather hear your number first before I quote anything.
Would love to be part of this. Could you share the comp for the package so I can see if the numbers make sense on my end?
Thanks for the details! For a Reel and three Stories with 30-day usage, my rate is $350 flat plus the commission. That works for my audience size.
Happy to work together. I usually charge $280 for a bundle like this, and the 10% commission on top is fine by me.
Love the shoes! My quote for this scope comes to $420. That covers the Reel, the Stories, and the month of usage rights.
Great, I can do this for $310. Send the products over and let's lock in an October date.
Thanks for thinking of me! My rate for a full Reel + 3 Stories set with usage is $465. I think you'll be happy with the production quality.
Interested! To make this worth the production effort I'd need $390. Everything else in the brief looks good to me.
Sounds good. For this deliverable list my fee comes to $255. I keep it reasonable for brands I genuinely like, and I like AeroSoft.
Thanks! I'm asking $445 for the Reel and Stories package with the 30-day license. That's my standard for this tier of collab.
Let's say $330 and we've got a deal. That feels fair for the content plus the usage window.
Excited about this one. My number is $475 for the whole set — Reel, three Stories, and the month of usage rights. Commission's fine too.
I'd charge $360 flat for this. I think that's a fair spot given the deliverables and the tight October timeline.
This works for me at $405. Happy to get the Reel scripted this week once we confirm.
Thanks! My price point for a bundle like this is $265. Keeps things simple and I can turn it around fast.
For the Reel plus Stories with usage I do $435. That's been my going rate this quarter and the footwear niche is perfect for me.
I'd be happy at $295 for the package. Love that shoes and socks are included too — nice touch.
Thanks for the breakdown. I'm in the $455 ballpark for this scope. If that's workable I'm ready to move.
My fee for the full set is $345. That includes a polished Reel and three well-shot Stories, plus the 30 days of usage.
Would love to make this happen. My rate lands at $480 for everything listed, which is the top of my usual range for a single-brand deal.
Thanks for the offer. For a Reel, three Stories, and a month of usage my rate is $500 flat. That's where I need to be for this kind of package.
Appreciate the details! I'm looking at somewhere in the $490 to $500 range for the full deliverable set. Can we make that work?
I'm interested, but I'd need $500 for this. The usage rights and the Reel production are what push it up to that number for me.
Once I add up the Reel, the Stories, and the license, it comes to $500. That's my quote for the complete package.
Thanks! For everything in the brief I'm at around $495. That's pretty firm given the scope and turnaround.
My ask is $500 for the Reel + 3 Stories with 30-day usage. I really like the brand so I'm keeping it at my standard top rate, not above.
Let me be upfront — $500 is my number for a package this size. If we can land there I'm ready to sign.
For the whole set I'd be in the high $490s. Call it $498. That reflects the Reel effort plus the month of usage.
My target for this collab is $500. I've priced out the Reel and Stories and that's the fair top for what you're asking.
With the 30-day usage baked in, my rate for the package is $500. Without usage I'd be lower, but you need the license so that's the figure.
Thanks for the offer, but for a Reel and three Stories with usage rights I'm firm at $550. That's my rate for brand deals this size.
I appreciate it, but I'd really need $600 to take this on. The usage window and exclusivity make it a bigger lift than a standard post.
My minimum for a full Reel + Stories package with a month of usage is $525. I can't really go under that for this scope, sorry!
Love the brand, but I'm looking at $575 for this. That's what my other footwear collabs have paid for comparable deliverables.
I'd want $540 for the complete set. The Reel alone takes me a full shoot day, and then there are the three Stories on top.
Thanks, but I honestly can't do this for under $560. My rates went up this year and that's where I land for a package with usage.
I'm pretty firm at $510 for this one. It's just a touch above your last number but reflects the usage rights you're asking for.
Given the Reel, three Stories, AND a 30-day license, my quote is $590. That's the fair market rate for the full scope in my niche.
I could maybe be talked down a little, but I'm starting at $535 and I don't have a lot of room below that for a package like this.
My standard for a Reel + Stories bundle with usage is $565. I like AeroSoft but I have to keep my rates consistent across brands.
The bottom line for me is $520 on this. I've thought it through and that's the least I can accept for the deliverables plus the license.
I'll be straight with you: $580 and it's largely non-negotiable. That's the rate my management sets for campaigns of this size.
Honestly I keep my rates low — $150 works for me for the whole Reel and Stories set. I mostly do it for the free shoes anyway!
I'm pretty new to sponsored stuff so $180 is totally fine with me for everything you listed. Excited to try the shoes!
I only charge $120 for a package this size — I like to keep it accessible for brands. The socks and shoes are a nice bonus.
I'd be happy with $165 for the Reel and three Stories. That's my usual and it keeps things easy on both sides.
$190 works perfectly for me. I've got the free time this month and I genuinely love the brand, so I'm not fussy on price.
For content like this I usually ask $135. That covers the Reel and the Stories and I'm good to start whenever.
Let's just do $175 total and call it a day. I keep my pricing simple and I'm excited to feature AeroSoft.
I can do the full deliverable set for $145. My audience is smaller so I price accordingly — hope that works on your end!
$185 is good for me for the Reel plus three Stories. I'd rather keep it affordable and build a longer relationship with the brand.
My flat rate for something like this is $160. Send the shoes and I'll get started on the Reel this week.
$350 works for me — let's do it! Send over the agreement and I'll get the shoes styled for the Reel.
Great, $420 is agreed on my end. Happy with the deliverables and timeline — where do I sign?
You know what, I'll take the $280. It's a bit under my usual but I love the brand and the shoes make up for it. Deal!
Sold at $465! That's exactly what I was hoping for. Let's get the paperwork moving so I can hit the October date.
Confirming I'm good with $310 plus the 10% commission. Let's lock it in — I'm ready to start.
Deal at $395. That's fair for the Reel and Stories with usage. Send the contract and product details my way.
Yes — $475 it is. I'm thrilled to work with AeroSoft. Just tell me my shoe size and we're rolling.
$330 works — I accept. Appreciate you meeting me in the middle. Let's get the October slot booked.
Let's lock in the $490. That's a great number for this package and I'm ready to go. Send over next steps!
I'm happy with $255. Let's make it official — I'll start prepping the Reel concept right away.
Yes, I'm totally in! This is such a good fit for my content. Let's do it — how do we get started?
Let's do it! I love AeroSoft and my audience will too. Count me in for the Reel and Stories.
This sounds great, I'm interested! Happy to move forward whenever you are. What are the next steps?
Count me in! I've been wanting to work with a footwear brand and this is perfect. Ready when you are.
Yes, let's go! I'm on board. Just send me whatever you need from me to kick things off.
I'd be happy to work with you on this! It's right up my alley. Let me know how we proceed from here.
Sign me up — I'm interested! The deliverables are totally doable for me. What's next?
I'd love to! AeroSoft is exactly the kind of brand I want in my feed. Let's make it happen — how do we start?
Thanks for the $320! I'm close — can we bump it to $375? That's a fair meeting point for the full package and I'll commit today.
Appreciate the $360 offer. Could we meet at $410? Given the usage rights that feels right, and then we're all set.
Thanks! $260 is close but can we get to $295? Small bump and I'll happily lock it in for October.
So close! Your $420 is nearly there. Can we nudge to $455 and shake on it? That covers my production costs neatly.
Thanks for the $300. Any chance for a bit more — say $340? That would make it a clear yes for me.
Let's split the difference — you're at $400, I was hoping higher, so how about $430? I'll sign right away at that.
Appreciate the $240. Could you do $270? It's a modest bump and then I'm fully committed to the timeline.
Your $450 is generous. Can we land at $480 to close this out? That's my ceiling and I'll happily sign there.
Thanks for the $350! I'd like to get to $390 given the Reel effort. If you can meet me there we're done.
$290 is a good start — can we go slightly higher to $325? That small adjustment makes it an easy yes on my side.
